creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Takefu <takefu@airport.fm> -----

Date: Tue, 20 Mar 2012 17:23:09 +0900
From: Takefu <takefu@airport.fm>
To: edwin@FreeBSD.org
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org, sylvio@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/166240: [UPDATE] devel/cdialog: update to 1.1.20120215

was wrong pkg-plist.
resent patch.

--- cdialog.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/cdialog/Makefile devel/cdialog/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/cdialog/Makefile	2012-02-16 20:48:29.000000000 +0900
+++ devel/cdialog/Makefile	2012-03-19 16:53:05.000000000 +0900
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	cdialog
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.20111020
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.20120215
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://invisible-island.net/${PORTNAME:S|^c||}/
@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@

 INSTALL_TARGET=	install-strip install-man install-lib

+.if !defined(NOPORTEXAMPLES)
 post-patch:
 	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC}/samples/ -type f -exec ${REINPLACE_CMD} -i "" "s|dialog|cdialog|g" {} \;

@@ -42,5 +43,6 @@
 	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
 	cd ${WRKSRC}/samples && ${FIND} . | \
 		${CPIO} -pdm -L -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
+.endif

 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/cdialog/distinfo devel/cdialog/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/devel/cdialog/distinfo	2012-02-16 20:48:29.000000000 +0900
+++ devel/cdialog/distinfo	2012-03-19 16:10:01.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (dialog-1.1-20111020.tgz) = 746bf18b8414985864835b61536cee826ac916e6827fbcad9faffb496cae8a7a
-SIZE (dialog-1.1-20111020.tgz) = 439031
+SHA256 (dialog-1.1-20120215.tgz) = 883c58498663d939b18f3aea56976b64268b736d1579ac850512e5d5a4a2eafc
+SIZE (dialog-1.1-20120215.tgz) = 441234
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/cdialog/files/patch-makefile.in devel/cdialog/files/patch-makefile.in
--- /usr/ports/devel/cdialog/files/patch-makefile.in	2012-02-16 20:48:29.000000000 +0900
+++ devel/cdialog/files/patch-makefile.in	1970-01-01 09:00:00.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,28 +0,0 @@
---- makefile.in.orig	2011-10-21 05:03:37.000000000 +0800
-+++ makefile.in	2011-12-25 02:59:10.781638649 +0800
-@@ -85,6 +85,7 @@
- LIBTOOL_LINK	= @LIB_LINK@
- LIBTOOL_INSTALL	= @LIB_INSTALL@
- LIBTOOL_UNINSTALL = @LIB_UNINSTALL@
-+LIBTOOL_VERSION = @LIBTOOL_VERSION@
-
- INSTALL		= @INSTALL@
- INSTALL_PROGRAM	= $(LIBTOOL_INSTALL) @INSTALL_PROGRAM@
-@@ -102,7 +103,7 @@
- # The library name $(LIB) is set at configure/make time, since it is used as a
- # makefile target.  Ditto for $(PROG).
- LIB		= @LIB_PREFIX@@PACKAGE@$a
--PROG		= dialog$x
-+PROG		= @PACKAGE@$x
- #
- # Standard .c to .o compile line.
- #
-@@ -180,7 +181,7 @@
- 	$(LIBTOOL_CREATE) $(LIB) $(LIB_OBJECT)
- 	$(RANLIB) $@
-
--dialog$x : $(LIB) dialog$o @INTLDIR_MAKE@ @INTLLIBS@
-+$(PROG)$x : $(LIB) dialog$o @INTLDIR_MAKE@ @INTLLIBS@
- 	$(LINK) -o $@ dialog$o -L. -l@PACKAGE@ $(LDFLAGS) $(LIBS)
-
- clean	\
